sqlMap.select: select * from TrusteeOrEstateSupp where TypeofTrustKey = #TypeofTrustKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey, NameOfTrust, StartEngagemenTrusttDate, ValueOfAssetsTrust, AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust, NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust, IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust, TypeofTrustKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TrusteeOrEstateSupp where TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey = #TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey#
sqlMap.update:
update TrusteeOrEstateSupp set
NameOfTrust = #NameOfTrust# NameOfTrust = null StartEngagemenTrusttDate = #StartEngagemenTrusttDate# StartEngagemenTrusttDate = null ValueOfAssetsTrust = #ValueOfAssetsTrust# ValueOfAssetsTrust = null AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust = #AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust# AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust = null NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust = #NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust# NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust = null IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust = #IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust# IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust = null TypeofTrustKey = #TypeofTrustKey# TypeofTrustKey = null VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# VersionSequence = null PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null
where TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey = #TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from TrusteeOrEstateSupp where TypeofTrustKey = #TypeofTrustKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey, NameOfTrust, StartEngagemenTrusttDate, ValueOfAssetsTrust, AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust, NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust, IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust, TypeofTrustKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TrusteeOrEstateSupp where TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey = #TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey#

select TrusteeOrEstateSuppKey, NameOfTrust, StartEngagemenTrusttDate, ValueOfAssetsTrust, AnnualIncomeofAssetsTrust, NumberOfBeneficiariesTrust, IsBeneficiaryInterestTrust from TrusteeOrEstateSupp where TypeofTrustKey = #TypeofTrustKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
